'''鈭歸-t-zh-l''' ('''kawatzheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lugubriate|lugubriate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lugubriate|lugubriate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-t-zh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawatzheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwatzheloko|thiwatzheloko]] || [[word:jiwatzheloko|jiwatzheloko]] || [[word:shiwatzheloko|shiwatzheloko]] || [[word:kiwatzheloko|kiwatzheloko]]
